name: Flat-Bonus Readouts (sample data+Python mod)
description: A data+Python mod: registers a new 'flat_bonus' readout kind so every Damage power shows a flat 'Signature Bonus' row. Because it runs code, it must be trusted as well as enabled.

options.label: Signature bonus
options.description: How large the flat Signature Bonus row is on every Damage power.
